zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY於1235年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安多福利時，他的父親Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED40歲，母親Morfydd ferch Meurig36歲。他於1240年與Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1311年10月9日在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾班格爾享年76歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯尼德班格爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY于1235年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利安多福利时，他的父亲Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED40岁，母亲Morfydd ferch Meurig36岁。他于1240年与Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1311年10月9日在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾班格爾享年76岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯尼德班格爾。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: GRONWY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gronow
meanings: Welsh: relationship name from the Welsh personal name Goronwy (also found as Gronw and Gronow, from Old Welsh Guorgonui).

nameMeanings.name: Tudor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

variants.name: Tudyr
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

nameMeanings.name: Hen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY was born in 1235, in Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, was 40 and his mother, Morfydd ferch Meurig, was 36. He married Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield in 1240, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 9 October 1311, in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Bangor, Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY est né en 1235, à Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Morfydd ferch Meurig, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield en 1240, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 octobre 1311, à Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Bangor, Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY 1235 in Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED 40 und seine Mutter Morfydd ferch Meurig 36. Er hat 1240 in Wales, United Kingdom Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Oktober 1311 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Bangor, Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY è nato il nel 1235 nel Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Morfydd ferch Meurig, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield nel 1240, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 ottobre 1311, nel Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Bangor, Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWYが1235年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランドベリーで生まれた時，父Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFEDは40歳，母Morfydd ferch Meurigは36歳であった。1240年にイギリスウェールズでAngharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1311年10月9日にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアバンゴルで76歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズグウイネッドバンゴルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY(이)가 1235년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜도버리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Morfydd ferch Meurig(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1240년 영국 웨일스에서 Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1311년 10월 9일 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 방어에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 그윈드 방어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY nasceu em 1235, em Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Morfydd ferch Meurig, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield em 1240, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de outubro de 1311, em Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Bangor, Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY родился в 1235 г. в местности лландовири, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Morfydd ferch Meurig, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield в 1240 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 октября 1311 г. в местности бангор, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности бангор, гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.Llangoed, Anglesey, Wales: Llangoed, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY nació en 1235, en Llandovery, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord of TREF-GASTEL Goronwy ap EDNYFED, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Morfydd ferch Meurig, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield en 1240, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de octubre de 1311, en Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Bangor, Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido.
